summary: Completed phases 4-5, 7-9. Phase 6 partially blocked by DiscreteSuccSeed.lean requiring redesign for strict semantics.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for phases 4-9 of axiom-based completion

review_reason: Phase 6 blocking issue: g_content_subset_mcs is FALSE under strict semantics. DiscreteSuccSeed.lean has 4 sorries and 1 workaround axiom. Discrete completeness construction needs redesign.

metadata.blocking_issue: DiscreteSuccSeed.lean: g_content M ⊆ M is FALSE under strict semantics. The discrete immediate successor consistency proof requires this property.

new_axioms.name: canonicalR_irreflexive_axiom
new_axioms.justification: Van Benthem non-definability theorem - irreflexivity not modally definable

new_axioms.name: g_content_subset_mcs_axiom
new_axioms.justification: WORKAROUND ONLY - mathematically FALSE under strict semantics
